name: Basic Cooked Jerusalem Artichoke
recipeInstructions:
1. Jerusalem artichokes, also known as sunchoke, are a seasonal vegetable that looks a bit like fresh ginger and tastes like a cross between potatoes and artichokes.
2. We enjoy them very much in Israel.
3. To prepare Jerusalem artichokes as a side dish, peel the artichokes and cook in boiling lightly-salted water for 1/2 to 1 hour, covered, until soft.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Sprinkle with fresh lemon juice.
